catalog.name: PhilSA POC — STAC Catalog
catalog.description: Earth-observation products from the PhilSA POC STAC API. Raster collections are tiled live by TiTiler; by-reference optical collections without a public COG are listed as info groups. Generated by `dashboard/build_catalog_from_stac.py` — re-run to resync. Unhandled collections: sentinel1-flood.

members.name: MULA — True Colour (5 m)
members.description: Philippine MULA 5 m true-colour multispectral imagery — near-real-time demo feed (simulated: Diwata-2 scenes re-dated to recent days). One layer per scene, tiled by TiTiler from the `mula` STAC collection (5 scene(s)).

info.name: About this dataset
info.content: **Simulated demo dataset.** MULA is PhilSA's upcoming 5 m, 9-band Earth-observation satellite (built with SSTL; not yet launched). These placeholder scenes reuse recent **Diwata-2 SMI** imagery **by reference**, re-dated to the last few days to illustrate a near-real-time MULA feed. This is **not** actual MULA data — see each item's `mula:source_item`.

info.name: Source & licence
info.content:
**Provider:** Philippine Space Agency (PhilSA) (producer, licensor); Surrey Satellite Technology Ltd (SSTL) (processor)  
**Licence:** proprietary (restricted)  
**Keywords:** mula, philsa, philippines, true-colour, simulated, demo

members.name: Vegetation Health (NDVI)
members.description: Vegetation greenness index. Green = dense vegetation, red = bare/water. Same-day granules are combined into one per-date layer (TiTiler /mosaicjson) from the `sentinel2-ndvi` STAC collection (8 date(s)).

info.name: About this dataset
info.content: Per-scene NDVI = (B08-B04)/(B08+B04) from Sentinel-2 L2A over the Philippines, as Cloud-Optimized GeoTIFF (silver tier).

info.name: Source & licence
info.content:
**Licence:** CC-BY-4.0  
**Keywords:** sentinel, philippines, silver, sentinel-2, sentinel2-ndvi, NDVI, vegetation

members.name: All-Weather Radar Imagery
members.description: Radar backscatter (grayscale). Sees through cloud; bright = rough/built. Same-day granules are combined into one per-date layer (TiTiler /mosaicjson) from the `sentinel1-sar` STAC collection (8 date(s)).

info.name: About this dataset
info.content: Geocoded Sentinel-1 IW GRD VV backscatter in dB over the Philippines, as Cloud-Optimized GeoTIFF (silver tier). Backscatter base layer — not a validated flood product.

info.name: Source & licence
info.content:
**Licence:** CC-BY-4.0  
**Keywords:** sentinel, philippines, silver, sentinel-1, sentinel1-sar, SAR, radar, VV backscatter

members.name: ESRI Land Cover (10 m, annual)
members.description: Annual land-cover classes (Impact Observatory). Categorical context layer. Same-day granules are combined into one per-date layer (TiTiler /mosaicjson) from the `esri-10m-lulc` STAC collection (1 date(s)).

info.name: About this dataset
info.content: Sentinel-2 derived 10m annual global LULC, 9-class scheme. Items reference public Azure COGs by href (not re-hosted).

info.name: Source & licence
info.content:
**Provider:** Impact Observatory (producer, processor); Esri (host)  
**Licence:** CC-BY-4.0

members.description:
**ESRI Land Cover (10 m, annual)** — acquired **2025-01-01**.  
8 granule(s) combined into one seamless layer for this date.

members.name: Natural-Colour Satellite Imagery
members.description: Natural-colour optical view (Sentinel-2, 10 m). Same-day granules are combined into one per-date layer (TiTiler /mosaicjson) from the `sentinel2-truecolor` STAC collection (8 date(s)).

info.name: About this dataset
info.content: Sentinel-2 L2A true-colour (TCI, 10 m) over the Philippines, as an 8-bit RGB Cloud-Optimized GeoTIFF (silver tier).

info.name: Source & licence
info.content:
**Licence:** CC-BY-4.0  
**Keywords:** sentinel, philippines, silver, sentinel-2, sentinel2-truecolor, true-colour, TCI, RGB

members.name: Diwata-2 SMI (true colour)
members.description: Philippine Diwata-2 multispectral imager (by reference; public COG on GCS). One layer per scene, tiled by TiTiler from the `diwata-2` STAC collection (12 scene(s)).

info.name: About this dataset
info.content: Diwata-2 Level 1C (Top-of-Atmosphere Reflectance) images from the Spaceborne Multispectral Imager (SMI). The dataset was processed during the STAMINA4Space Program of the University of the Philippines (UP) and Department of Science and Technology (DOST). Operations of Diwata-2 is continued by Philippine Space Agency (PhilSA).

info.name: Source & licence
info.content:
**Provider:** University of the Philippines (processor, producer, licensor); Philippine Space Agency (host)  
**Licence:** CC-BY-SA-4.0

members.name: Administrative Boundaries (PH)
members.description: Philippine administrative boundaries — country, region, province, city/municipality and barangay (adm0–adm4). **All levels are open data.** Streamed as PMTiles vector tiles from R2 (the same derivative the webmap uses); the canonical geometry is the admin-boundary GeoParquet (silver tier). Off by default — enable a level to overlay it on any imagery. Dense levels (city/municipality, barangay) appear as you zoom in.

members.name: Country (adm0)
members.description: Philippine administrative boundaries — **Country**. Vector tiles (PMTiles) streamed from R2 — the same web derivative the webmap uses; canonical geometry lives in the admin-boundary GeoParquet (silver tier). Click a feature to read its attributes (name, P-code, area).

members.name: Regions (adm1)
members.description: Philippine administrative boundaries — **Regions**. Vector tiles (PMTiles) streamed from R2 — the same web derivative the webmap uses; canonical geometry lives in the admin-boundary GeoParquet (silver tier). Click a feature to read its attributes (name, P-code, area).

members.name: Provinces (adm2)
members.description: Philippine administrative boundaries — **Provinces**. Vector tiles (PMTiles) streamed from R2 — the same web derivative the webmap uses; canonical geometry lives in the admin-boundary GeoParquet (silver tier). Click a feature to read its attributes (name, P-code, area).

members.name: Cities / Municipalities (adm3)
members.description: Philippine administrative boundaries — **Cities / Municipalities**. Vector tiles (PMTiles) streamed from R2 — the same web derivative the webmap uses; canonical geometry lives in the admin-boundary GeoParquet (silver tier). Click a feature to read its attributes (name, P-code, area).

members.name: Barangays (adm4)
members.description:
Philippine administrative boundaries — **Barangays**. Vector tiles (PMTiles) streamed from R2 — the same web derivative the webmap uses; canonical geometry lives in the admin-boundary GeoParquet (silver tier). Click a feature to read its attributes (name, P-code, area).

_Open data (not restricted). Barangay level — appears as you zoom in._

members.name: SkySat (Planet) — high-res optical (by reference, not tiled)
members.description:
The `skysat` STAC collection (45 item(s)) is catalogued **by reference** — only thumbnails and cloud-hosted metadata are public, so there is no map-tileable COG to render here. Browse the items via the STAC API: http://localhost:8082/collections/skysat/items

![preview](https://storage.googleapis.com/dpad-bucket/SS/Scene/20230616_222848_ssc15d3_0013/20230616_222848_ssc15d3_0013_pansharpened_thumbnail.png)

info.name: About this dataset
info.content: SkySat satellite constellation provides submeter resolution up to 50-cm high-resolution imagery, with datasets available in specific areas across the Philippines. SkySat © 2024 Planet Labs PBC.

info.name: Source & licence
info.content:
**Provider:** Planet Labs PBC (processor, producer); Philippine Space Agency (host)  
**Licence:** proprietary (restricted)

members.name: PlanetScope (Planet) — daily optical (by reference, not tiled)
members.description:
The `planetscope` STAC collection (98 item(s)) is catalogued **by reference** — only thumbnails and cloud-hosted metadata are public, so there is no map-tileable COG to render here. Browse the items via the STAC API: http://localhost:8082/collections/planetscope/items

![preview](https://storage.googleapis.com/dpad-bucket/PS/Scene/20230510_011527_88_24b4/20230510_011527_88_24b4_3B_AnalyticMS_SR_8b_harmonized_clip_thumbnail.png)

info.name: About this dataset
info.content: PlanetScope images are captured by Dove satellite constellation, offering approximately 3-m spatial resolution and are available in select areas of the Philippines. PlanetScope © 2024 Planet Labs PBC.

info.name: Source & licence
info.content:
**Provider:** Planet Labs PBC (processor, producer); Philippine Space Agency (host)  
**Licence:** proprietary (restricted)
